mapper.select: SELECT RGN_CD FROM REGION WHERE RGN_NAME = #{rgnName} AND RGN_USE_YN = 'Y' LIMIT 1

SELECT DISTINCT p.PLC_NO AS id, p.PLC_NAME AS name, p.PLC_RGN_CD AS regionCode, r.RGN_NAME AS regionName, p.PLC_CAT_CD AS placeCategory, cat.CMM_CD_NAME AS placeCategoryName, p.PLC_LOT AS x, p.PLC_LAT AS y, p.PLC_OVERVIEW AS overview, p.PLC_FLT_CD AS placeFilter, flt.CMM_CD_NAME AS placeFilterName, p.PLC_MAIN_IMG_URL AS imgUrl, ( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(cc.CMM_CD_NAME) FROM PLACE_TAG_MAP ptm2 JOIN CMM_CODE cc ON ptm2.PTAG_TAG_CD = cc.CMM_CD WHERE ptm2.PTAG_PLC_NO = p.PLC_NO AND cc.CMM_GROUP_CD = 'GRP004' ) AS placeThemeName FROM PLACE p JOIN REGION r ON p.PLC_RGN_CD = r.RGN_CD JOIN CMM_CODE cat ON p.PLC_CAT_CD = cat.CMM_CD JOIN CMM_CODE flt ON p.PLC_FLT_CD = flt.CMM_CD LEFT JOIN PLACE_TAG_MAP ptm ON p.PLC_NO = ptm.PTAG_PLC_NO WHERE p.PLC_RGN_CD = #{rgnCd} AND p.PLC_USE_YN = 'Y' AND p.PLC_FLT_CD != 'FLT014' AND (
ptm.PTAG_TAG_CD IN
#{code}
OR p.PLC_CAT_CD = 'PLC003'
OR p.PLC_CAT_CD = 'PLC004'
OR p.PLC_FLT_CD = 'FLT010'
OR p.PLC_CAT_CD = 'PLC001'
OR p.PLC_FLT_CD = 'FLT021' ) ORDER BY CASE WHEN p.PLC_MAIN_IMG_URL IS NOT NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, p.PLC_NO DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO AI_SCHEDULE ( AIS_MBR_ID, AIS_SCHDUL_NAME, AIS_BEGIN_DATE, AIS_END_DATE, AIS_TOT_DAYS, AIS_RGN_NO, AIS_THEME1_CD, AIS_THEME2_CD, AIS_THEME3_CD, AIS_RLS_YN ) VALUES ( #{mbrId}, #{scheduleName}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{totalDays}, #{rgnNo}, #{theme1}, #{theme2}, #{theme3}, 'N' )
mapper.select: SELECT RGN_NO FROM REGION WHERE RGN_NAME = #{rgnName} AND RGN_USE_YN = 'Y' LIMIT 1

SELECT AIS_NO AS aisNo, AIS_SCHDUL_NAME AS aisSchdulName, AIS_BEGIN_DATE AS aisBeginDate, AIS_END_DATE AS aisEndDate, AIS_TOT_DAYS AS aisTotDays, AIS_RLS_YN AS aisRlsYn, AIS_REG_DATE AS aisRegDate FROM AI_SCHEDULE WHERE AIS_MBR_ID = #{mbrId} AND AIS_USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY AIS_REG_DATE DESC

SELECT s.AIS_NO AS aisNo, s.AIS_SCHDUL_NAME AS aisSchdulName, s.AIS_BEGIN_DATE AS aisBeginDate, s.AIS_END_DATE AS aisEndDate, s.AIS_TOT_DAYS AS aisTotDays, s.AIS_RGN_NO AS aisRgnNo, s.AIS_THEME1_CD AS aisTheme1Cd, s.AIS_THEME2_CD AS aisTheme2Cd, s.AIS_THEME3_CD AS aisTheme3Cd, (SELECT CMM_CD_NAME FROM CMM_CODE WHERE CMM_CD = s.AIS_THEME1_CD AND CMM_USE_YN = 'Y') AS aisTheme1Name, (SELECT CMM_CD_NAME FROM CMM_CODE WHERE CMM_CD = s.AIS_THEME2_CD AND CMM_USE_YN = 'Y') AS aisTheme2Name, (SELECT CMM_CD_NAME FROM CMM_CODE WHERE CMM_CD = s.AIS_THEME3_CD AND CMM_USE_YN = 'Y') AS aisTheme3Name, d.AISD_NO AS aisdNo, d.AISD_DAY_NO AS aisdDayNo, d.AISD_TRAVEL_DATE AS aisdTravelDate, p.AISP_NO AS aispNo, p.AISP_PLC_NO AS aispPlcNo, p.AISP_VISIT_ORDR AS aispVisitOrdr, pl.PLC_NAME AS plcName, pl.PLC_CAT_CD AS plcCatCd, cat.CMM_CD_NAME AS plcCatName, pl.PLC_FLT_CD AS plcFltCd, pl.PLC_LAT AS plcLat, pl.PLC_LOT AS plcLot, pl.PLC_OVERVIEW AS plcOverview, pl.PLC_MAIN_IMG_URL AS plcMainImgUrl, r.RGN_NAME AS rgnName FROM AI_SCHEDULE s JOIN AI_SCHEDULE_DAY d ON s.AIS_NO = d.AISD_AIS_NO JOIN AI_SCHEDULE_PLACE p ON d.AISD_NO = p.AISP_AISD_NO JOIN PLACE pl ON p.AISP_PLC_NO = pl.PLC_NO JOIN CMM_CODE cat ON pl.PLC_CAT_CD = cat.CMM_CD JOIN REGION r ON s.AIS_RGN_NO = r.RGN_NO WHERE s.AIS_NO = #{aisNo} ORDER BY d.AISD_DAY_NO, p.AISP_VISIT_ORDR
mapper.update: UPDATE AI_SCHEDULE SET AIS_SCHDUL_NAME = #{scheduleName}, AIS_UP_DATE = NOW() WHERE AIS_NO = #{aisNo}
